europe.title: EMBARK ON THE SCENIC JOURNEY OF EUROPE
europe.basis: Per person on twin/double sharing basis
highlights: Eiffel Tower visit with champagne toast
Vatican City tour including Sistine Chapel
itinerary: Day 1-2: Paris - Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Seine Cruise
Day 4: Amsterdam - Canal Cruise, Anne Frank House
Day 5-6: Berlin - Brandenburg Gate, Berlin Wall

southAfrica.title: Celebrate The Eid Holidays With A Joyful Getaway
southAfrica.basis: per person on a twin/double sharing basis
highlights: Soweto township tour including Mandela House
Morning and evening game drives in Pilanesberg
Sun City casino and entertainment complex
Visit to the Cradle of Humankind
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival Johannesburg - Transfer to Sun City
Day 2: Pilanesberg National Park - Game Drives
Day 3: Sun City - Valley of Waves, Casino
Day 4: Soweto Tour - Mandela House, Vilakazi Street
inclusions: Complimentary access to the Peermont resort

egypt.title: Celebrate Eid With A Journey Through The Ancient Wonders
egypt.basis: per person on a twin/double sharing basis
highlights: Pyramids of Giza and Sphinx visit
Egyptian Museum with King Tut's treasures
Luxor Temple and Karnak Temple complex
Hot air balloon ride over Valley of the Kings
itinerary: Day 1: Cairo - Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx
Day 2: Cairo - Egyptian Museum, Khan El Khalili
Day 3: Fly to Luxor - Karnak Temple, Luxor Temple
Day 4: Luxor - Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple
Day 5: Return to Cairo for departure
inclusions: 3N Cairo Accommodation in Pyramids Park Resort in Cairo / similar (BB basis)
1N Luxor Accommodation in Aracan Luxor Hotel / similar (BB basis)
All transfers in Cairo and Luxor
All your tours and excursions are with an A/C Vehicle
The service of meet and assist at all your destinations
All your visits include entrance fees
Our prices include all taxes and services
